/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fPIC -fopenmp -fPIC -g -fopenmp -msse -msse2 -msse3 -msse4 -msse4.1 -msse4.2  -fPIC -fopenmp -fPIC -g -O2 -fopenmp -fPIC -g -ggdb -shared -Wl,-soname,liblightning__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o liblightning__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/lightning__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/lightning/srv/loc_cmd__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lightning__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/lightning/srv/save_map__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/slam_ws/src/lightning-lm/build_test:/opt/ros/humble/lib: liblightning__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libnav_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libnav_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
